summary.lv: GR8 Tech (iGaming platforma) meklē Engineering Manager sporta likmju komandai, kas vadīs komandas attīstību, sniegs atsauksmes un risinās komandas konfliktus, vienlaikus pārraugot tehnisko piegādi.
summary.en: GR8 Tech (an iGaming platform) is hiring an Engineering Manager for the Sportsbook team to lead team management and development, deliver performance feedback and oversee technical delivery.
